binding: Slot 0 output of drafter_forward must be byte-identical across N_slots ∈ {1,2,4,8} when each slot's content is identical.

method.comparison: byte-by-byte memcmp of slot 0's 256 fp16 elements, plus FNV-1a 64 hash logging

summary.subruns_byte_identical: 12 / 12 (N=1 vs N=2, N=1 vs N=4, N=1 vs N=8, × 4 seeds)

architectural_extension.lm_head: dflash_drafter_lm_head_launch takes n_rows (not N_slots); per-row CTA dispatch with no N_slots-dependent geometry. If drafter_forward hidden is byte-identical, lm_head logits at slot 0's rows are byte-identical.
architectural_extension.argmax_match: dflash_argmax_match_launch's per-slot argmax is one-warp computation on slot's logit rows. No cross-slot reduction. Per-slot output depends ONLY on that slot's logit rows.
architectural_extension.combine_features: T3 closure already validated byte-identity vs CPU oracle across N_slots ∈ {1,2,4,8}; per-anchor CTA dispatch.
architectural_extension.inject_kv_fused: T3 closure already validated byte-identity vs CPU oracle across N_slots ∈ {1,2,4,8}; per-anchor-per-layer CTA dispatch.

out_of_scope_for_this_gate: Full-cycle coherence at np > 1 through the TARGET stack — the production multi-slot Qwen3.6-27B determinism bug surface (per project_mtp_multislot_determinism_investigation_failed). T7 is a kernel-level invariance probe; np > 1 end-to-end ship gates on T9 + that prior bug surface being navigated separately.
implementation_note: Drafter_forward kernel deviated from spec §6.1's 'cooperative WMMA mega-kernel' (see dflash-drafter-forward.cu:8-12 — uses regular per-step __global__ launches with grid_rows = N_slots × Q, block_sum_f32 per-block reduction). This deviation is exactly the TML 3-kernel pattern (kernel-design.md §5.5). The probe witnesses the deviation is correct: no N_slots-dependent reduction order.
